title: Deployment probe output
description: Slice of repo-context produced by DeploymentProbe (Layer A, Phase 1; S4-02). Strict (`additionalProperties: false`) at the slice root, at `image_reference` (ImageRefBlock), and at every `EnvironmentEntry` (ADR-0004). The single documented exception is `security_context`, which is `additionalProperties: true` because Kubernetes `SecurityContext` is a ~30-field evolving structured type and verbatim pass-through is the load-bearing convention. ADR-0012 is honored by carrying both `image_reference: ImageRefBlock | null` (singleton, nullable primary) AND `environments: list[EnvironmentEntry]` (additive, may be empty). The slice is OPTIONAL at the envelope (ADR-0010): repos without Helm/Kustomize/k8s/Terraform may omit `deployment` entirely or emit `type: "none"`. Warning IDs match the ADR-0007 pattern (`^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*\.[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$`); per-values-file parse failures emit the bare `helm.values_file_parse_error` ID and the offending path is recorded under `raw/deployment.json`, not in the WarningId itself (per S4-01 CN-1 / S4-02 CN-1 resolution). Per ADR-0011 no `helm template` / `kustomize build` / `python-hcl2` is invoked; Terraform is paths-only.

type.description: Highest-precedence detected deployment shape; `none` distinguishes ran-and-found-nothing from didn't-run (the slice is still emitted).

chart_path.description: Repo-relative POSIX path to `Chart.yaml`. Null when type != "helm".

path.description: Dotted path into the values mapping (e.g., `image.repository`) where the reference was extracted.

image_reference.description: Primary singleton image reference (ADR-0012). Set for `values.yaml`-only Helm; null for multi-env-without-baseline or non-Helm types.

environments.description: ADR-0012 additive multi-env list. One entry per detected `values-<env>.{yaml,yml}` file. Sorted by `name`. Empty for single-env or non-Helm types.

name.description: Environment name from filename stem (`values-prod.yaml` -> `prod`); falls back to full stem when filename does not match the dash-separator convention.

terraform_files.description: Lex-sorted list of repo-relative POSIX paths to `*.tf` files. Paths only per ADR-0011 (no parsing).

kustomization_resource_path_outside_repo.description: True when any `kustomization.yaml#resources` entry resolved outside the repo root (zip-slip refused). The offending path is NOT recorded in the slice (path-leak hygiene); see `raw/deployment.json`.

oneOf.description: DOCUMENTED ADR-0004 EXCEPTION: Kubernetes `SecurityContext` is a ~30-field evolving structured type. Verbatim pass-through is the load-bearing convention; the Planner reads further if needed (production ADR-0005 facts-not-judgments).

security_context.description: Verbatim `containers[0].securityContext` from the first Deployment-family workload encountered. Null when no workloads.

exposed_ports.description: Sorted-ascending, deduplicated `containerPort` values from Deployment-family workload containers.

required_env_vars.description: Sorted-alpha, deduplicated `env[].name` values from Deployment-family workload containers. NAMES ONLY — values never leak into the slice (ADR-0011 facts-not-judgments).

warnings.description: Soft-degrade signals. Each item matches the ADR-0007 ID pattern. Membership is enumerated in `deployment.py::_WARNING_IDS`.

errors.description: Forward-compatible per-slice typed-exception IDs. Membership enumerated in `deployment.py::_ERROR_IDS`.
